posts.text: The bottom has fallen out of the job market  https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2025/06/16/why-todays-graduates-are-screwed?taid=69de3a6f7d0c9b0001416c23&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: US March PPI inflation rises to 4.0%, its highest since February 2023.

Core PPI inflation was unchanged, at 3.8%, also the highest since February 2023.

We are now officially seeing inflation metrics in the US that are at 4% or higher.

Inflation is back.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
